headline: S&P 500 at critical support crossroads
detail: The market is at a technical inflection point where a downside break could accelerate selling. On margin, a broad market leg lower hits every name you own simultaneously, amplifying drawdowns across PLTR, AVGO, CRWD, and your leveraged SpaceX plays.

headline: Microsoft historic June rout on spending concerns
detail: Investor frustration with heavy AI capex is hammering Microsoft and creating a guilt-by-association drag on the broader tech sector. This sentiment directly pressures high-multiple tech names like PLTR and CRWD which are already in the red in your book.

headline: Apple MacBooks and iPads getting pricier as memory crunch deepens
detail: A tightening memory market is a direct revenue tailwind for chip suppliers. This is modestly constructive for AVGO and SMH, though macro headwinds and your current loss position in AVGO mean this alone is not a reason to add.

headline: On Semiconductor acquires Synaptics for $7B in physical AI push
detail: A major chip M&A deal signals continued industry consolidation around AI hardware themes. This is broadly supportive of SMH sentiment, your one chip holding currently in the green at +14.55%.
